news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted in recent commentary as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose value. This implies a bearish outlook for the instrument itself, suggesting that its structure and the current market environment are unfavorable for its performance. Investors are cautioned against trading this and similar instruments due to their inherent decay.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVXY my PUT expired on friday and now it’s going down 🤯🤯🤯🤯
